zh.Western Europe, Europe: 艾歐洛維斯特 艾歐洛
zh.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland於0980年出生。他和Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth至少有1個女兒。他去世於1057年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年77歲。

zh-hans.Western Europe, Europe: 艾歐洛維斯特 艾歐洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland于0980年出生。他和Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth至少有1个女儿。他去世于1057年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland was born in 0980. He had at least 1 daughter with Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. He died in 1057, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland est né en 0980. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. Il est décédé en 1057, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland wurde 0980 geboren. Er hatte mit Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1057 im Alter von 77 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland è nato il nel 0980. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. Morì nel 1057, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberlandは0980年に生まれた。彼はEaldgyth Widow Of Sigeforthとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1057年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland(은)는 0980년 태어났다. 그는 Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1057년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland nasceu em 0980. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. Ele faleceu em 1057, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland родился в 0980 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. Он умер в 1057 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Aethling Of Northumberland nació en 0980. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Ealdgyth Widow Of Sigeforth. Murió en 1057, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
